caption:
OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5-Cyber, outperforming Anthropic's Mythos on key cybersecurity benchmarks. This model is part of a broader initiative to enhance cybersecurity through innovative tools. 4a51f6a5e0f 

How do you think AI will reshape cybersecurity? 

Sources: The Decoder

plan.caption:
OpenAI has launched GPT-5.5-Cyber, outperforming Anthropic's Mythos on key cybersecurity benchmarks. This model is part of a broader initiative to enhance cybersecurity through innovative tools. 4a51f6a5e0f 

How do you think AI will reshape cybersecurity?

slides.headline: OPENAI'S GPT-5.5-CYBER OUTPERFORMS ANTHROPIC'S MYTHOS IN SECURITY
slides.sub: Here's the latest achievement in AI.
slides.image_prompt: A high-tech cybersecurity lab with people working on computers, analyzing data on screens, and discussing strategies, with a focus on a diverse group of professionals.

slides.headline: GPT-5.5-CYBER SCORED HIGHEST ON KEY SECURITY BENCHMARKS
slides.sub: OpenAI's new model leads in CyberGym and SEC-bench Pro tests.
slides.image_prompt: A detailed view of a computer screen displaying cybersecurity metrics and performance graphs, with a bright and focused atmosphere.

slides.headline: OVER 30 MILLION COMMITS SCANNED BY CODING SECURITY PLUGIN
slides.sub: The updated plugin flagged 500,000 issues as fixed automatically.
slides.image_prompt: A developer examining code with a magnifying glass, highlighting specific lines of code on a screen, showcasing attention to detail.

slides.headline: PARTNER NETWORK INCLUDES OVER 25 SECURITY FIRMS
slides.sub: OpenAI collaborates with various firms and governments for cybersecurity.
slides.image_prompt: A conference room setting with representatives from different companies discussing cybersecurity strategies around a table, with charts and laptops.

slides.headline: GPT-5.5-CYBER BRIDGES THE GAP IN CYBERSECURITY PATCHING
slides.hl: BRIDGES THE GAP IN CYBERSECURITY PATCHING
slides.sub: And it integrates with existing vulnerability management systems.
slides.image_prompt: A close-up of hands typing on a keyboard, with a digital interface illustrating patching processes and security protocols.

story.title: OpenAI says new GPT-5.5-Cyber outperforms Anthropic's Mythos on cybersecurity benchmark
